name: Omelette De Pineapple
recipeIngredient: 4 slices Bacon, cooked crisp and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a Teflon omelette pan over high heat until small vapor bubbles form.
2. Pour in the melted butter. When the butter stops bubbling, add the eggs.
3. Cook, shaking the pan rapidly in a circular motion, until the omelette is set but still slightly soft in the center.
4. Slide the omelette onto a heated plate and spoon pineapple into the center.
5. Add the cooked bacon and cream cheese, then fold the omelette in half.
